dct_title_s: United States National Highway Planning Network, 2013
dct_description_sm: The National Highway Planning Network is a comprehensive network database of the nation's major highway system. It consists of the nation's highways comprised of Rural Arterials, Urban Principal Arterials and all National Highway System routes. The data set covers the 48 contiguous States plus the District of Columbia, Alaska, Hawaii, and Puerto Rico. The nominal scale of the data set is 1:100,000 with a maximal positional error of ±80 meters.
dct_creator_sm: United States. Bureau of Transportation Statistics
dct_publisher_sm: United States. Bureau of Transportation Statistics
dct_rightsHolder_sm: United States. Department of Transportation. Research and Innovative Technology Administration
